name: Somerset Travel Center (Roady's)
description: Travel center and truck-repair facility off the I-70/I-76 Turnpike Exit 110 at Somerset offering fuel, 24-hour road service, truck and trailer repairs, and tires.

name: North Midway Service Plaza
description: Pennsylvania Turnpike service plaza on the I-70/I-76 concurrency near milepost 147.3 by Bedford, with Sunoco fuel, diesel, truck parking, and food options.

name: South Midway Service Plaza
description: Pennsylvania Turnpike service plaza on the I-70/I-76 concurrency near milepost 147.3, offering Sunoco fuel, diesel, truck parking, and food.

name: TA Breezewood (TravelCenters of America #075)
description: Full-service TravelCenters of America truck stop at the I-70/I-76 Exit 161 interchange in Breezewood with extensive truck parking, fuel lanes, showers, a CAT Scale, and truck service bays.

name: Gateway Travel Plaza
description: Long-running 24-hour Breezewood travel plaza on the US-30/I-70 corridor offering fuel, a family restaurant and food court, showers, laundry, and a truck service center.

name: Pilot Travel Center Breezewood
description: Pilot Travel Center on Post House Road in the Breezewood cluster near the I-70/I-76 interchange, with fuel, showers, and a CAT Scale for trucks.

name: Mega Truck Stop (former Flying J)
description: Independent truck stop on Post House Road in Breezewood, a former Flying J, offering diesel fuel, showers, laundry, and a CAT Scale.
